name: Calibration
description: Fresh builds from master methodology scored with automated tools. Identify gaps the methodology doesn't address.

trials.notes: First trial scored with all 24 dimensions. 14 scorer bugs fixed before scoring.
Builder agents timed out during context window but completed on disk. Re-scored after 3 scorer bug fixes.
Methodology v0.5-dc. Key regressions from T4 in multiple dimensions. 10/14 dimensions fail.
Methodology v0.6-dc. Gates 1-3 fully effective. Gate 4 regressed due to VERIFY tag naming mismatch — agents added human-readable VERIFY tags that don't match TRACED IDs. 5/14 dimensions fail.

Methodology v0.7-dc. Gates 4-5 effective. CRITICAL FINDING: v0.8-dc Gate 9 misdiagnosed — targets infrastructure files but scorer checks frontend-backend integration (token storage, auth headers, route matching). Universal failures: (1) 0/3 projects have CREATE POLICY despite RLS enabled, (2) 0/3 store auth tokens after login, (3) 3/3 have mock-returns-mock pattern. 5/14 dimensions fail. Methodology updated to v0.9-dc with corrections.

Methodology v0.9-dc. Gates effective for targeted dimensions. But fix-induced regressions from `as any`+`||` patterns, wrong spec filenames, RLS uuid cast on TEXT cols, missing ESLint config + lint errors, tar vuln via bcrypt. New failure modes: FM-17 through FM-22. 5/14 pass. Methodology updated to v1.0-dc.
Methodology v1.0-dc. All 8 T8 regressions fixed. 13/14 pass. Only remaining failure: FD missing pnpm.overrides for effect>=3.20.0 (Prisma transitive vuln). Methodology updated to v1.1-dc.

Methodology v1.1-dc. Targeted fix confirmed. But 4 regressions: orphan VERIFY+wrong file types, no token storage/auth headers, unscoped monitoring controller, inline test fixtures. 10/14 pass. Methodology updated to v1.2-dc.

Methodology v1.2-dc. All 4 targeted fixes worked. 2 new regressions from EM builder: missing @types/jest-axe + @testing-library/jest-dom type augmentation, ESLint 9 with legacy .eslintrc.json. 12/14 pass. Methodology updated to v1.3-dc.

Methodology v1.3-dc. Both targeted fixes worked. 3 new regressions from TRACED in .prisma files causing convention and traceability orphan issues, plus short spec index. Common root cause: TRACED in .prisma files. 11/14 pass. Methodology updated to v1.4-dc (TRACED whitelist + SPEC-INDEX min lines).
Methodology v1.4-dc. All 3 targeted fixes worked. FIRST TRIAL WITH 14/14 PHASE 0 PASSING. Clean trial #1. Minor non-blocking regressions in 3 dimensions — all still pass.
Methodology v1.4-dc (unchanged from T13). 14/14 PASS — CONVERGED (consecutive clean #2). FD remains weakest on non-Phase-0 dimensions.

name: Test Execution
description: Tests must actually pass. Coverage must meet thresholds.

trials.notes: Methodology v1.5-dc (Gate 12: co-located unit tests). All projects pass. 16/16 Phase 0+1 dimensions pass. Clean trial #1 for Phase 1. FM-33 fixed (zero co-located unit tests). Residual: scorer self-referential bug (not a code issue).
Methodology v1.5-dc (unchanged from T15). 16/16 Phase 0+1 dimensions pass. Clean trial #2 — PHASE 1 CONVERGED. Stable across 2 consecutive trials.

name: Container Verification
description: Docker builds succeed. Compose starts. Healthchecks respond. Seed runs.

trials.notes: Methodology v1.6-dc (Gate 13: Infrastructure Integration). All projects pass. 17/17 Phase 0+1+2 dimensions pass. Clean trial #1 for Phase 2. 6 new failure modes found. Fixes: compose postgres ports removed (host conflict), tsbuildinfo excluded from Docker context, incremental:false in tsconfig.build.json, FD shared package.json entry point corrected.
Methodology v1.6-dc (unchanged from T17). 17/17 Phase 0+1+2 dimensions pass. Clean trial #2 — PHASE 2 CONVERGED. Stable across 2 consecutive trials.

name: Runtime Validation
description: Running containers serve traffic. Performance under load. Accessibility audits.

trials.notes: Phase 3 baseline — scored against v1.6-dc code (no Gate 14). Multiple dimensions fail: missing response time/correlation headers, no accessibility prep, no edge case specs/coverage output.

Methodology v1.8-dc (Gate 14: Runtime Validation). 9 dimensions fail. EM shared package noEmit:true caused no dist/ output, crashing API at runtime and tanking multiple runtime dimensions. Scorer bug in unit test detection. Methodology updated with FM-45 through FM-49.

Methodology v1.8-dc (unchanged). 8 dimensions fail (1 fewer than T19). Some fixes effective. EM runtime broken: Dockerfile missing shared package.json (FM-51). Multiple scorer bugs fixed (pino log contamination, no Chrome binary). New FMs: FM-50, FM-51, FM-52.

Methodology v1.9-dc. 9 dimensions fail. FM-50/FM-51/FM-52 fixes effective for targeted dimensions. But regressions: missing RLS verification, missing migration, missing GlobalExceptionFilter + RLS gaps. Net improvement over T20.

Methodology v2.0-dc (Gate 15: 25 rules). 8 dimensions fail. Gate 15 rules effective for some dimensions. Major regressions in traceability orphans and convention violations. FD is the weakest project. Net +6 points over T21.

Methodology v2.1-dc (Gate 16, R26-R41). 18 dimensions fail — major regression from T22. Gate 16 effective for conventions/traceability. But runtime dimensions collapsed: builds fail, containers broken, no test execution. Scorer uses stricter binary checks. Net -68 points from T22.

Methodology v3.0-dc. First clean Phase 3 trial. All 24 dimensions pass across all 3 projects. Highest average ever. Phase 3 targets all resolved. Remaining deductions: docker compose health/db timing, RSS growth, short specs, minor integration gaps.
Methodology v3.0-dc. Second consecutive clean Phase 3 trial — Phase 3 CONVERGED. All 24 dimensions pass. 0 new failure modes.

name: Edge Case & Completeness
description: Business logic edge cases traced from spec to test to branch coverage. Feature completeness verified.

trials.notes: Methodology v3.0-dc. First Phase 4 trial. All 24 dimensions pass (24/24). AE rebuilt with mock-Prisma integration tests, SkipThrottle on monitoring, real DB health check, env fallback cleanup. EM/FD copied from T25. Clean trial #1.
